title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.
notes: Incredible screenplay structure and intense background soundscapes by Ludwig Göransson.

tasks.text: Watch the behind-the-scenes IMAX practical effect documentaries

title: Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse
synopsis: The highly anticipated finale of Miles Morales' journey through parallel dimensions across the Spider-Verse.
notes: Must stay completely offline around release week to protect against visual spoiler posts.
